markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy and address stakeholder concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Pivot from a high-volume blog focus to a "flashy" PSEO (Programmatic SEO) strategy to satisfy Robert's push for innovation.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [**Reporting Overhaul:** Reports will shift from a "book report" to a dashboard with clear quantitative goals to improve visibility for Robert.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:** Prioritize net-new content for new strategic pillars. Allison will handle refreshes of older content to preserve the 5-post/week production.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [**API Access:** Allison will provide the required API access by EOD today to unblock GrowthX's work.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

## Topics

### Stakeholder Alignment & Reporting

  - [**Problem:** Robert's focus on blog volume stems from a lack of visibility into strategic work, creating a need for better enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Solution:** Overhaul performance reports into a dashboard with clear quantitative goals for at-a-glance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Communication:** GrowthX will post more frequent updates in Slack to highlight wins (e.g., AI visibility) and provide strategic context.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Strategic Pivot: PSEO vs. Ebooks

  - [**Decision:** Pursue a PSEO strategy over a one-off ebook.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**PSEO:** Aligns with Robert's desire for a "flashy," disruptive approach.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
      - [**Ebook:** A tactical stopgap for a product launch, better handled internally or by a cheaper contractor.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Constraint:** The current $12k/mo retainer (a grandfathered discount vs. the new $18k/mo rate) covers 5 editorial pieces/week. A PSEO project would be an add-on.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)

### Content Execution & Priorities

  - [**Priority:** Focus production on net-new content for the new strategic pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [**Content Refreshes:** Allison will handle refreshes of older content to preserve the 5-post/week production for new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**FAQ Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [GrowthX is adding FAQs to new content using H2s/H3s.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Action:** Allison will investigate a universal FAQ block to improve structured data and AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Topic Planning & AirTable

  - [**New Topics:** GrowthX has added high-intent topic ideas to the "New Considering" tab in AirTable, scraped from recent call transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Action:** Allison to review the list and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**Action:** Katya to clean up the AirTable data by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Provide API access to GrowthX by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Investigate a universal FAQ block for content pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [Review "New Considering" topics in AirTable and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Follow up on API access by 3 PM today if not received.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Clean up AirTable data by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [Scope a PSEO strategy for Monograph.](https://fathom.video/share/xryuQAPWo1sH1LoQx3MsZDR5Ph_2otVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
